## Which process document do you want to update?

<new document>

---

## Summary of New Content

Create a comprehensive README file for the OctoAcme Project Management Docs that serves as the central entry point for all project management documentation. The README should include:

- A brief overview of OctoAcme's project management approach and principles
- Summary of key processes across the project lifecycle (initiation, planning, execution, release, retrospectives)
- Organized links to all documentation in the docs folder
- Quick navigation guide for different roles (Developers, Product Managers, Project Managers)

---

## Why is this update needed?

Currently, the docs folder contains multiple individual process documents that are not well-connected. New team members may not know where to start or how different processes relate to each other. A README with a summary of processes and organized links will:

- Improve discoverability of process documentation
- Reduce onboarding time for new team members
- Provide a single source of truth for understanding the OctoAcme project management lifecycle
- Align with the purpose of this Copilot Space: to centralize scattered project management knowledge and convert tacit team insights into searchable, versioned artifacts

---

## Suggested Content

The README should include sections for:

1. **OctoAcme Project Management Overview** - Brief intro to principles and approach
2. **Project Lifecycle Summary** - High-level overview of the five phases (Initiation, Planning, Execution, Release, Close & Retrospective)
3. **Quick Start by Role** - Links organized by role:
   - For Developers
   - For Product Managers
   - For Project Managers
   - For Stakeholders
4. **Process Documentation** - Links to all docs in a logical lifecycle flow:
   - [Project Initiation Guide](docs/octoacme-project-initiation.md)
   - [Project Planning Guide](docs/octoacme-project-planning.md)
   - [Execution & Tracking Guide](docs/octoacme-execution-and-tracking.md)
   - [Risk Management & Communication](docs/octoacme-risks-and-communication.md)
   - [Release & Deployment Guide](docs/octoacme-release-and-deployment.md)
   - [Retrospective & Continuous Improvement](docs/octoacme-retrospective-and-continuous-improvement.md)
   - [Roles and Personas](docs/octoacme-roles-and-personas.md)
5. **Getting Help** - How to request updates to documentation using the "Add Content to Project Management Process Docs" issue template

---

## Acceptance Criteria

- [x] Content aligns with existing process docs
- [x] Update improves clarity or closes a documented gap (addresses navigation and discovery gap for new team members)
- [x] Proposed content has been reviewed with stakeholders
